star_3.text: Ads should be less annoying (you can make it in a small window instead of popping out when the user does some action), also the requirements are too strict for some of the exercises, and I think the explanation of each exercise should be better, or there should be a "preview" of an exercise. And a dark theme.
Why doesn't the app vibrate even though I have high battery percentage?
it is good and interesting to play
So many unnecessary things that will just waste your time.

star_4.text: It's nice but the sound test has a touch delay for me, unsure if its related for my device or related to the app. I tried holding down then releasing when i heard the sound, but it still had delay. Also the sound doesn't stop if you were holding the screen and the sound was playing when the time is up.

The app interface is good and smooth, and provides a variety of nicely designed games to improve your brain's speed. However, it is also pretty unresponsive. I press on the correct button and I often have to press a few times for it to react. This is especially problematic in the Find Colour and Swipe games.

Very nice app, nice design, interesting games however 1. would be good to have a countdown before game starts 2. A restart button 3. An actual visual record (like a chart) for the reaction time & precision of every individual game. 4. It says rankings on the description but i didn't see any... 5. The "stability of attention" chart isn't understable 6. Statistic page has some redondant items Overall this app has a great potential hidden in the records, statistic and calendar pages.

This game is very useful and good but a problem is that in a exercise named moving point having something issue because I didn't even a wrong pressed on the screen and everytime it shows me 30 40 or 50% of wrong press.
Fun game to use to train your reaction speed. I went from not being able to hit the ball in baseball to hitting it 80% of the time

really great app but the only thing i dont like is how sometimes when you tap someting it doesn't register it and you have to click it twice. i see this happen most in find color but it happens in other games too like colored cells
It is a very good app but the swipe test is little unresponsive. I swipe it 5 times until it responds. Please fix
It is a very nice app. It actually increase our reaction power.
felt it was slightly invasive but seems okay

do it harder it's much easy for me

star_5.text: I would like to note a very nice design of the application. Contrasting colors allow you not to strain your eyes. As for the "stuffing" itself, it is very exciting, the most simple, but interesting. Excellent tasks aimed at the formation of mindfulness and the development of reaction. I think this is especially helpful for kids. I like that it all starts with a simple exercise for attention and then gradually comes the study of memorization. I recommend both to work with children and yourself.

Based on the positive reviews, I decided to check out Reflex myself - and I didn't regret it! The game works perfectly, and I didn't find any major bugs. As for ads, the minimal amount of it is simply inspiring. And the application screen is clear and logical. I recommend it to everyone who likes to play without obstacles

I had no idea before how much the premium version could change my impression of the game. The puzzles have become more complex and interesting, and this version is really worth the money. The screen just captures my whole world, transporting me to a wonderful world.

This is the app I've been lusting after for a long time. Frankly, the premium version costs its money, but it's worth every penny. The puzzle here are very clever and creative, and the screen allows you to enjoy every pixel of the task

This app is a real discovery! For not a lot of money, I got a lot of fascinating puzzle that are simply captivating. The screen reproduces details well, allowing you to focus on the task even with a small size

This mobile app is simply amazing! I don't remember the last time I saw any crashes or freezes. Its speed is off the charts - levels load instantly, and the transition between screens is seamless. The application screen is stylish and clear, everything is easy to find. This app is a real pleasure for every player!

Speed and stability are the main advantages of this mobile application. It works perfectly, there are no crashes or delays. The speed of loading levels and switching between screens is amazing. The screen of the app is designed with ergonomics in mind, which makes it easy to navigate the app. I recommend this app for all fans of speed and stability!

This mobile app is the fastest I've ever tried! There is not a single crashes, everything works amazingly smoothly. The speed of loading levels and switching between screens is amazing. The screen is very well designed and everything on it is in a logical order. I'm passionate about this app!
There is a calendar with the dates when I did the exercises. I can track my statistics and it's great. No bugs
If you're looking for an app to train your brain without bugs and lots of ads, this is the app you need.
This app is a real find for little money! The puzzle are very clever and make me excited. The screen renders colors bright and contrasty, which makes for a comfortable game.

He has won my heart. Its flawless performance left me pleasantly surprised, and the lack of bugs makes the game even more enjoyable. There are minimal ads in the app, and the screen is clear and convenient.

Unlimited fun! Reflex is a great app that has no bugs, but only a lot of exciting levels. Ads are rarely shown in the app without disturbing players, and this is a big plus. The screen is expertly designed, user-friendly, and pleasant to navigate. I am delighted with this app!
A very high-quality app without bugs. It works stably, the exercises are interesting and useful. I recommend it to everyone
This app should definitely get a high rating. The full version is very cheap. It has no ads and no bugs.
I used to use a similar app, but it always crashes. Here everything is done well and the full version is inexpensive, I have the money for it
I'm not a developer, but I can say that this app is very well made. I haven't had any crashes. I would buy the full version but I don't have the money right now.
I finally found an app without bugs. This program works well, contains interesting brain exercises. It helps me to develop.
Some people write that the app is slow, but it's not true, it works very fast and without crashes.
I can use the free version. It has free exercises. I don't have money to buy paid apps. I really like this app because it doesn't bugs.
